'''Brahle Logris''' was an [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Assassin/Legends|assassin]] who specialized in poisoning his targets.

==Biography==
It is believed he started his career with killing his own father in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]]. He was confronted by him in regards to large sums being embezzled from their corporate accounts. Realizing he had been discovered, he coated his father's computer in a slow-acting contact poison that mimicked heart failure.<ref name="fm">{{WEGCite|story=Family Matters|book=Galaxy Guide 11: Criminal Organizations}}</ref>

Afterwards, he was a suspect, and tried, on murder charges three times, but was not convicted. In [[8 ABY/Legends|8 ABY]] he was convicted for the attempted murder of a [[Sector Ranger/Legends|Sector Ranger]] on [[Gandalla]], and sent to [[Prison/Legends|prison]] on [[Tamazall/Legends|Tamazall]]. He was freed from captivity when [[Kumac]] paid [[Deshic Mall]] to betray his fellow [[Tamazall Militia]] members and assist the assassin.<ref name="Qualifications">{{WEGCite|story=Your Qualifications Have Been Considered|book=Galaxy Guide 11: Criminal Organizations}}</ref>

Logris met with a arms dealer to purchase a [[Sporting blaster/Legends|sporting blaster]]. Not wanting to pay the 25,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] for the weapon, he coated his money with a quick acting contact poison to kill the dealer and left with the blaster.<ref name="Dirtymoney">{{WEGCite|story=Dirty Money|book=Galaxy Guide 11: Criminal Organizations}}</ref>

On [[Bresallis]], Logris broke into a hotel room across from [[Ambassador/Legends|Ambassador]] [[Walads]]'s penthouse and shot him with a customized blaster/slugthrower rifle that was designed to penetrate the armored windows and deliver a slug coated with poison to ensure the ambassador's death.<ref name="hutt">{{WEGCite|story=Hutts 1, Bresallis 0|book=Galaxy Guide 11: Criminal Organizations}}</ref> 

==Personality and traits==
Logris used delayed reaction poisons in his killing and made sure he was present when they took effect. He was obsessed with personal appearance and prided himself on his immaculate appearance. He would acquire the medical records of his targets, and prepare selections of rare poisons specifically for his victim.<ref name="GG11" />
